heading: Moneys in the Rural Electrification and Telephone Revolving Fund
label: 933 Moneys in the Rural Electrification and Telephone Revolving Fund
text: Moneys in the fund shall remain on deposit in the Treasury of the United States until disbursed.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .May 11, 1973section 12 of Pub. L. 93–32section 930 of this title
